ddls:
CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address associated with the user account */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user account (hashed and salted) */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, moderator, user) */,
  "last_visit" TEXT /* Date of the user's last visit */,
  "last_ip" TEXT /* IP address of the user's last visit */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the user account is active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp to record when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp to record the last time the user account was updated */,
  "failed_login_attempts" INTEGER /* Integer to track the number of failed login attempts */,
  "last_failed_login" TEXT /* Timestamp to record the last failed login attempt */,
  "lockout_expiration" TEXT /* Timestamp to indicate when the account will be unlocked after multiple failed attempts */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role FOREIGN KEY ("role") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_profiles" (
  "profile_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user profile */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user the profile belongs to */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the user */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the user */,
  "profile_picture_url" TEXT /* URL of the user's profile picture */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Brief biography of the user */,
  "social_media_links" TEXT /* Links to the user's social media profiles */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp to record when the profile was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp to record the last time the profile was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("profile_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_profiles_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "content" (
  "content_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each content item */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the content item */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the content item */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of content (e.g., game, music, video) */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the content was uploaded */,
  "creator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the content */,
  "is_published" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the content is published */,
  "publish_date" TEXT /* Date the content was published */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the content (e.g., draft, published, archived) */,
  "views_count" INTEGER /* Number of views the content has received */,
  "likes_count" INTEGER /* Number of likes the content has received */,
  "dislikes_count" INTEGER /* Number of dislikes the content has received */,
  "comments_count" INTEGER /* Number of comments the content has received */,
  "rating" REAL /* Average rating of the content */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp to record when the content was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp to record the last time the content was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("content_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_content_creator_id FOREIGN KEY ("creator_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "content_tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag */,
  "content_id" INTEGER /* ID of the content item the tag belongs to */,
  "tag_name" TEXT /* Name of the tag */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp to record when the tag was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp to record the last time the tag was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_content_tags_content_id FOREIGN KEY ("content_id") REFERENCES content ("content_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_activity" (
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each activity log */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the activity */,
  "content_id" INTEGER /* ID of the content item associated with the activity */,
  "activity_type" TEXT /* Type of activity (e.g., view, play, purchase) */,
  "activity_date" TEXT /* Date the activity occurred */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user when the activity occurred */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the user's browser */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp to record when the activity was logged */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("activity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_activity_content_id FOREIGN KEY ("content_id") REFERENCES content ("content_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_activity_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "credits" (
  "credit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each credit log */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who earned or spent credits */,
  "credit_amount" INTEGER /* Amount of credits earned or spent */,
  "credit_type" TEXT /* Type of credits (e.g., earned, spent) */,
  "transaction_id" TEXT /* Unique transaction ID for the credit transaction */,
  "transaction_date" TEXT /* Date of the transaction */,
  "transaction_type" TEXT /* Type of transaction (e.g., purchase, reward) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the transaction */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp to record when the credit log was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("credit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_credits_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permission" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp to record when the role was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp to record the last time the role was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)
